TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Suriname u Suriname sa i labu nu tebanan atu timulan a Amilika (Cong-nan-mey-cuo šł≠ŚćóÁĺéśī≤), itiza i 4 00 N, 56 00 W. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 163,820 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 156,000 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 7,820 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 585,824. kakalukan umah sa 0.50%, kilakilangan umah sa 94.60%, zumaay henay umah sa 4.90% tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Paramaribo . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 25 bulad 11 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci Chan Santokhi, micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihca 7 bulad 3 demiad. kiwkay nu Suriname Suriname kunhekuo itidai Na-maicuo amisan, amis micapi tu Ta-siyung ,timulan micapi tu Brazil (Pa-si Ś∑īŤ•Ņ),waliyan micapi tu France (Fa-kuo ś≥ēŚúč) nu Guyana (Kua-ya-na Ťďčšļěťā£), nutipan mitepal tu Guyana (Kua-ya-na Ťďčšļěťā£),u Na-mia-cuo kanatal linmun a tademaw nu kanatal, knatal nu ngangan mialatu nu itidaay a yin-cu-min nu Suriname a tademaw a ngangan. nina kanatal malumanay a ngangan nu Netherlands He-lam nu Guyana (Kua-ya-na Ťďčšļěťā£), naw Netherlands He-lan itidai Na-mia-cuo anikuwawnan nu liwan nu babalaki, cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku sepat (1954) mala Netherlands He-lan wankuo nu hekal a bayuay anikuwanan, cacay a malebut siwaw a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku lima (1975) a mihcaan amisiteked. Suriname amica aw lala' haw u tademaw haw ku sakasilsil nu ngangan, saadidi'ay namin nu Na-mia-cuo a kanatal, nu Si-pan-ciu caay kaw nu anisakaputan a niyadu'ay, nu tapang misakamuay tu Netherlands He-lan a sasakamuen. . suodu u Pa'la'ma'puon nu Suriname kakaydaan nu nanum nu caculilan nu balunga a sasiwbayan. u binacadan ku Suriname , kamu, pina kunipisincian a kanatalan, tademaw nu Mu-se-lin miala tu Suriname a tademaw tu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (13%) a kilacan, tu kilacan mikiyadahay tu Amilikan a kanatal. likisi nuayawan nu si-yun tulu a malebut (3000) a mihcaan, Suriname a niyadu' idaw tu ku tademaw muenengan itida', itidaay nu muenengay a yuncumin, satabakiyay nu binacadan u micapiay tu bayu nu pahabaya tu cacana a papahabayan u A-la-waw a tademaw, atu maheka micumuday nu midebungay a tademaw, pacunaay tu balunga a binacadan a Caribbean (Cia-le-pi a tademaw Śä†ŚčíśĮĒšļļ) a tademaw. nina tusaay a angangan nu binacadan, itini i kacaledesan nu udaudan a kilakilangan idaw ku adidi'ay aniyadu'an nu binacadan. katukuh i cacay a malebut enem a lasubu lima a bataan (1650) a mihcaan , miteka tu sayaway nu tayniay a Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) tademaw, tawyaay a Pa-pa'-duo cun-du ci Wey-Le-Bi cue-se (ť≠ŹŚčíśĮĒÁąĶŚ£ę, Lord Willoughby)mililidaay tu Yinkelisi (Ing-kuo ŤčĪŚúč) mabulaway tayni i Suriname patideng tu misatadasay nu Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) malimaday a tademaw. caay ka tanes nikuwanan nu Yinkelisi (Ing-kuo ŤčĪŚúč) debungan nu Ya-puola-han. ke'lan-sen (Abraham Crijnsen mililiday tu He-lan mabulaway nu hitay amidebang, nina ni kalepacawan katukuh tu cacay a malebut enem a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku pitu (1667) a mihcaan tu saka tusa nu IngHe anikalepacawan tu hedek kiya siwantan, tawya masasulit ku Ing-kuo atu Netherlands He-lan tu pulieta nika sasulitan tu cudad (Treaty of Breda, ŚłÉŚąóťĀĒśĘĚÁīĄ), itini i He-lan Netherlands itida Man-ha-dun-subal patideng tu angngan nu sapikuwaw tu " baluhay a Amu-sete'-dan" atu Ing-kuo malaliyun tu Suriname , paangangan han misumada tu He u Kay-ya-na . sipakayda i He nu-kay-ya-na atu Cia-le-pi-bayu a duma nu pinaay a nikalimadan nu tademawan a subalan, He-lan Netherlands pu'tan nuheni ku tawyaay a kanatal nu angangan nu misangay tu Lanmu aepah, Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤)) a tademaw namaka Abilika pacumit tu katuuday a tubing tayniitini a niyadu' mikuli, namakayda hida ku lingantu nu Fia-cuo Na-ma a tademawan. cacay a malebtu pitu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku siwa (1799) a mihcaan , sipakayni i He-lan Netherlands maala nu Napuolunn mililitay tu Fa-kuo midebung, Ing-kuo a tademaw malingatu alaen nu Suriname amikuwan, nika i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku enem (1816) a mihcaan ci Na-puo-lun kanatal malawpes satu sipabeli aca tu Netherlands He-lan . . amica ku Ingkuo apuyu kuni pikuwan tu Suriname pahutin tu lumeniay a tademaw, nika patalumaenac ku Netherlands He-lan mikuwan tu Suriname , katukuh i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tulu (1863) a mihcaan tu nikudan mihapu tu kalung amilawpes sa, sisa sadikuday ku Netherlands He-lan sadikuday miales tu kalung nu kawawan nu Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) a kanatal. kakitidaan PaLa-MaLi-Puo (ŚłēśčČť¶¨ťáĆŚćö, Paramaribo) tapang tusu u Pala-mali-puo "Paramaribo" atu biyaway nu niyadu' mialatu kanatal nu pangkiw nu tademaw, itini a mueneng, mapacudad i pulung nu kanatal a nisakaputan nu cudada nu liwan namakababalakiay nuni sulitan a ngangan, sakahemekan sa nu laylayan. nutipanay a dadipasan nutipan a dadipasan kitidaan nu ayam maud kunikasi nganganan, Bigi Pan saka lihalay a dadiputen a kitidaan mala tataydaan nu midangan nu tademawan. waliay a dadipasan wali a kitidaan nu malimaday ni palumaan tu kilakilangan, katukuh ayda cukaymasen tu, idaw kuni alesan atu nipipecian. mililis tu dadipasan, maadih numita i Si-Ta-si-yun nu bilanga picedekan nu dadibuan a bayu. sakaudip nuaw malukay henay ku Suriname a angangan a kanatal, masumad mala ba'ba'tuwan nikasilaculan a kanatal, aydanu satabakiyay nu kitakidan a li-fan-tu sakatahekalan, u li-fan-tu u angangan nu lainli sakae'timan nu kakatahekalan. lala' atu demiad Suriname u masabuyuay atu apuuay a buyan, nama amis a dadipasan apuyu ku lala', pasayda i timulan haymaw sa a talakaw ku buyu', kilangkilangaan mikiyadah tu kanatal nu lalaan tu pitu a bataan idaw ku lima a kilac (75%), u kacaledesan a maudaday a kilangkilangan a demiad. Suriname amisan mitepal tu Ta-si-yung , timulan atu Pa-si mababiyaw, walian atu Kay-ya-na malalitin, nutipan atu Fa-kuo nu Kua-ya-na mababenis, uyda a cacay atu Fa-kuo nu Kay-ya-na malalitin tu Ma-luo-ni sawac a talawadaw, madademec henay tu aalawan tu lilisan, atu Kay-ya-na lilisan a bayuan maaalaw henay. kaudadan a kilangkilangan nu Suriname Suriname a labu nu niyadu' u Ya-ma-sin a kitidaan, mamin matahepu' nu kacaledesan a maudaday a kilangkilangan. nutipan timuan u "Sipaliwini" nu kacaledesan nu lutuklutukan a kitidaan. i teban atu nutipan u buyubuyu'an, nika satalakaway a buyu' u Julianatop makaala tu cacay a malebut tusa alasubu walu a bataan (1280) a lawat ku talakaw. katuuday nu Ma-cuo nu In-ti-an a tademaw atu Ma-lun a tademaw itini namin maudip. katuud henay ku masa mukasiay kuni ka udipan. Brokopondo nina banaw han satabakiay nu kitakit a sauwacan.

ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj sa ***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa *,*** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa ***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa *.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj tapaŇč tusu u par~…ĺa-mar~…ĺi-puo "paramaribo" atu bijawaj nu nijadu Ē~ ° miar~…ĺatu kanatar~…ĺ nu paŇčkiw nu tad…ômaw, itini a mu…ôn…ôŇč, mapa ¶udad i pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ a nisakaputan nu ¶udada r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a dadiput…ôn a kitidaan mar~…ĺa tatajdaan nu midaŇčan nu tad…ômawan. war~…ĺiaj a dadipasan war~…ĺi a kitidaan nu mar~…ĺimadaj ni par~…ĺumaan tu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, katukuńß ajda ¶ukajmas…ôn tu, idaw kuni ar~…ĺ…ôsan atu nipip…ô ¶ian. mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu dadipasan, maadińß numita i si-ta-si-jun nu bir~…ĺaŇča pi ¶…ôd…ôkan nu dadibuan a baju. sakaudip nuaw mar~…ĺukaj ńß…ônaj ku surinam…ô a aŇčaŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ, masumad mar~…ĺa ba Ē~ °ba Ē~ °tuwan nikasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a kanatar~…ĺ, ajdanu satabakijaj nu kitakidan a r~…ĺi-fan-tu sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺan, u r~…ĺi-fan-tu u aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺainr~…ĺi saka…ô Ē~ °timan nu kakatańß…ôkar~…ĺan. r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu d…ômiad surinam…ô u masabujuaj atu apuuaj a bujan, nama amis a dadipasan apuju ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, pasajda i timur~…ĺan ńßajmaw sa a tar~…ĺakaw ku buju Ē~ °, kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčaan mikijadańß tu kanatar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan tu pitu a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima a kir~…ĺa ¶ (**%), u ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan a maudadaj a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan a d…ômiad. surinam…ô amisan mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu ta-si-juŇč , timur~…ĺan atu pa-si mababijaw, war~…ĺian atu kaj-ja-na mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin, nutipan atu fa-kuo nu kua-ja-na mabab…ônis, ujda a ¶a ¶aj atu fa-kuo nu kaj-ja-na mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ma-r~…ĺuo-ni sawa ¶ a tar~…ĺawadaw, madad…ôm…ô ¶ ńß…ônaj tu aar~…ĺawan tu r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, atu kaj-ja-na r~…ĺir~…ĺisan a bajuan maaar~…ĺaw ńß…ônaj. kaudadan a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan nu surinam…ô surinam…ô a r~…ĺabu nu nijadu Ē~ ° u ja-ma-sin a kitidaan, mamin matańß…ôpu Ē~ ° nu ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan a maudadaj a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan. nutipan timuan u "sipar~…ĺiwini" nu ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan a kitidaan. i t…ôban atu nutipan u bujubuju Ē~ °an, nika satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° u *ur~…ĺianatop makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa ar~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan (****) a r~…ĺawat ku tar~…ĺakaw. katuudaj nu ma- ¶uo nu in-ti-an a tad…ômaw atu ma-r~…ĺun a tad…ômaw itini namin maudip. katuud ńß…ônaj ku masa mukasiaj kuni ka udipan. brokopondo nina banaw ńßan satabakiaj nu kitakit a sauwa ¶an.
S.FORM: Suriname u Suriname sa i labu nu tebanan atu timulan a Amilika (Cong-nan-mey-cuo šł≠ŚćóÁĺéśī≤), itiza i 4 00 N, 56 00 W. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 163,820 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 156,000 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 7,820 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 585,824. kakalukan umah sa 0.50%, kilakilangan umah sa 94.60%, zumaay henay umah sa 4.90% tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Paramaribo . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 25 bulad 11 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci Chan Santokhi, micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihca 7 bulad 3 demiad. kiwkay nu Suriname Suriname kunhekuo itidai Na-maicuo amisan, amis micapi tu Ta-siyung ,timulan micapi tu Brazil (Pa-si Ś∑īŤ•Ņ),waliyan micapi tu France (Fa-kuo ś≥ēŚúč) nu Guyana (Kua-ya-na Ťďčšļěťā£), nutipan mitepal tu Guyana (Kua-ya-na Ťďčšļěťā£),u Na-mia-cuo kanatal linmun a tademaw nu kanatal, knatal nu ngangan mialatu nu itidaay a yin-cu-min nu Suriname a tademaw a ngangan. nina kanatal malumanay a ngangan nu Netherlands He-lam nu Guyana (Kua-ya-na Ťďčšļěťā£), naw Netherlands He-lan itidai Na-mia-cuo anikuwawnan nu liwan nu babalaki, cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku sepat (1954) mala Netherlands He-lan wankuo nu hekal a bayuay anikuwanan, cacay a malebut siwaw a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku lima (1975) a mihcaan amisiteked. Suriname amica aw lala' haw u tademaw haw ku sakasilsil nu ngangan, saadidi'ay namin nu Na-mia-cuo a kanatal, nu Si-pan-ciu caay kaw nu anisakaputan a niyadu'ay, nu tapang misakamuay tu Netherlands He-lan a sasakamuen. . suodu u Pa'la'ma'puon nu Suriname kakaydaan nu nanum nu caculilan nu balunga a sasiwbayan. u binacadan ku Suriname , kamu, pina kunipisincian a kanatalan, tademaw nu Mu-se-lin miala tu Suriname a tademaw tu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (13%) a kilacan, tu kilacan mikiyadahay tu Amilikan a kanatal. likisi nuayawan nu si-yun tulu a malebut (3000) a mihcaan, Suriname a niyadu' idaw tu ku tademaw muenengan itida', itidaay nu muenengay a yuncumin, satabakiyay nu binacadan u micapiay tu bayu nu pahabaya tu cacana a papahabayan u A-la-waw a tademaw, atu maheka micumuday nu midebungay a tademaw, pacunaay tu balunga a binacadan a Caribbean (Cia-le-pi a tademaw Śä†ŚčíśĮĒšļļ) a tademaw. nina tusaay a angangan nu binacadan, itini i kacaledesan nu udaudan a kilakilangan idaw ku adidi'ay aniyadu'an nu binacadan. katukuh i cacay a malebut enem a lasubu lima a bataan (1650) a mihcaan , miteka tu sayaway nu tayniay a Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) tademaw, tawyaay a Pa-pa'-duo cun-du ci Wey-Le-Bi cue-se (ť≠ŹŚčíśĮĒÁąĶŚ£ę, Lord Willoughby)mililidaay tu Yinkelisi (Ing-kuo ŤčĪŚúč) mabulaway tayni i Suriname patideng tu misatadasay nu Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) malimaday a tademaw. caay ka tanes nikuwanan nu Yinkelisi (Ing-kuo ŤčĪŚúč) debungan nu Ya-puola-han. ke'lan-sen (Abraham Crijnsen mililiday tu He-lan mabulaway nu hitay amidebang, nina ni kalepacawan katukuh tu cacay a malebut enem a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku pitu (1667) a mihcaan tu saka tusa nu IngHe anikalepacawan tu hedek kiya siwantan, tawya masasulit ku Ing-kuo atu Netherlands He-lan tu pulieta nika sasulitan tu cudad (Treaty of Breda, ŚłÉŚąóťĀĒśĘĚÁīĄ), itini i He-lan Netherlands itida Man-ha-dun-subal patideng tu angngan nu sapikuwaw tu " baluhay a Amu-sete'-dan" atu Ing-kuo malaliyun tu Suriname , paangangan han misumada tu He u Kay-ya-na . sipakayda i He nu-kay-ya-na atu Cia-le-pi-bayu a duma nu pinaay a nikalimadan nu tademawan a subalan, He-lan Netherlands pu'tan nuheni ku tawyaay a kanatal nu angangan nu misangay tu Lanmu aepah, Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤)) a tademaw namaka Abilika pacumit tu katuuday a tubing tayniitini a niyadu' mikuli, namakayda hida ku lingantu nu Fia-cuo Na-ma a tademawan. cacay a malebtu pitu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku siwa (1799) a mihcaan , sipakayni i He-lan Netherlands maala nu Napuolunn mililitay tu Fa-kuo midebung, Ing-kuo a tademaw malingatu alaen nu Suriname amikuwan, nika i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku enem (1816) a mihcaan ci Na-puo-lun kanatal malawpes satu sipabeli aca tu Netherlands He-lan . . amica ku Ingkuo apuyu kuni pikuwan tu Suriname pahutin tu lumeniay a tademaw, nika patalumaenac ku Netherlands He-lan mikuwan tu Suriname , katukuh i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tulu (1863) a mihcaan tu nikudan mihapu tu kalung amilawpes sa, sisa sadikuday ku Netherlands He-lan sadikuday miales tu kalung nu kawawan nu Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) a kanatal. kakitidaan PaLa-MaLi-Puo (ŚłēśčČť¶¨ťáĆŚćö, Paramaribo) tapang tusu u Pala-mali-puo "Paramaribo" atu biyaway nu niyadu' mialatu kanatal nu pangkiw nu tademaw, itini a mueneng, mapacudad i pulung nu kanatal a nisakaputan nu cudada nu liwan namakababalakiay nuni sulitan a ngangan, sakahemekan sa nu laylayan. nutipanay a dadipasan nutipan a dadipasan kitidaan nu ayam maud kunikasi nganganan, Bigi Pan saka lihalay a dadiputen a kitidaan mala tataydaan nu midangan nu tademawan. waliay a dadipasan wali a kitidaan nu malimaday ni palumaan tu kilakilangan, katukuh ayda cukaymasen tu, idaw kuni alesan atu nipipecian. mililis tu dadipasan, maadih numita i Si-Ta-si-yun nu bilanga picedekan nu dadibuan a bayu. sakaudip nuaw malukay henay ku Suriname a angangan a kanatal, masumad mala ba'ba'tuwan nikasilaculan a kanatal, aydanu satabakiyay nu kitakidan a li-fan-tu sakatahekalan, u li-fan-tu u angangan nu lainli sakae'timan nu kakatahekalan. lala' atu demiad Suriname u masabuyuay atu apuuay a buyan, nama amis a dadipasan apuyu ku lala', pasayda i timulan haymaw sa a talakaw ku buyu', kilangkilangaan mikiyadah tu kanatal nu lalaan tu pitu a bataan idaw ku lima a kilac (75%), u kacaledesan a maudaday a kilangkilangan a demiad. Suriname amisan mitepal tu Ta-si-yung , timulan atu Pa-si mababiyaw, walian atu Kay-ya-na malalitin, nutipan atu Fa-kuo nu Kua-ya-na mababenis, uyda a cacay atu Fa-kuo nu Kay-ya-na malalitin tu Ma-luo-ni sawac a talawadaw, madademec henay tu aalawan tu lilisan, atu Kay-ya-na lilisan a bayuan maaalaw henay. kaudadan a kilangkilangan nu Suriname Suriname a labu nu niyadu' u Ya-ma-sin a kitidaan, mamin matahepu' nu kacaledesan a maudaday a kilangkilangan. nutipan timuan u "Sipaliwini" nu kacaledesan nu lutuklutukan a kitidaan. i teban atu nutipan u buyubuyu'an, nika satalakaway a buyu' u Julianatop makaala tu cacay a malebut tusa alasubu walu a bataan (1280) a lawat ku talakaw. katuuday nu Ma-cuo nu In-ti-an a tademaw atu Ma-lun a tademaw itini namin maudip. katuud henay ku masa mukasiay kuni ka udipan. Brokopondo nina banaw han satabakiay nu kitakit a sauwacan.

ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj sa ***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa *,*** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa ***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa *.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj "sipar~…ĺiwini" nu ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan a kitidaan. i t…ôban atu nutipan u bujubuju Ē~ °an, nika satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° u *ur~…ĺianatop makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa ar~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan (****) a r~…ĺawat ku tar~…ĺakaw. katuudaj nu ma- ¶uo nu in-ti-an a tad…ômaw atu ma-r~…ĺun a tad…ômaw itini namin maudip. katuud ńß…ônaj ku masa mukasiaj kuni ka udipan. brokopondo nina banaw ńßan satabakiaj nu kitakit a sauwa ¶an.
